member.name: M:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.MarkerData.CompareTo(UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.MarkerData)
member.summary: Compare the time duration between the marker median times. Used for sorting in descending order
member.returns: -1 if this is larger, 0 if the same, 1 if this is smaller

member.name: F:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.FrameTime.ms
member.summary: Duration in the frame in milliseconds

member.name: F:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.FrameTime.frameIndex
member.summary: Index of which frame this time duration occured on. A zero based frame index

member.name: F:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.FrameTime.count
member.summary: Number of occurrences

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.FrameTime.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Single,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initialise FrameTime
member.param: The duration of the frame in milliseconds

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.FrameTime.#ctor(UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.FrameTime)
member.summary: Initialise from another FrameTime

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.FrameTime.CompareTo(UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.FrameTime)
member.summary: Compare the time duration between the frames. Used for sorting in ascending order
member.returns: -1 if this is smaller, 0 if the same, 1 if this is larger

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.FrameTime.CompareMs(UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.FrameTime,UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.FrameTime)
member.summary: Compare the time duration between two FrameTimes. Used for sorting in ascending order
member.returns: -1 if a is smaller, 0 if the same, 1 if a is larger

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.FrameTime.CompareCount(UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.FrameTime,UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.FrameTime)
member.summary: Compare the instance count between two FrameTimes. Used for sorting in ascending order
member.returns: -1 if a is smaller, 0 if the same, 1 if a is larger

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.FrameTime.CompareMsDescending(UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.FrameTime,UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.FrameTime)
member.summary: Compare the time duration between two FrameTimes. Used for sorting in descending order
member.returns: -1 if a is larger, 0 if the same, 1 if a is smaller

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.FrameTime.CompareCountDescending(UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.FrameTime,UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.FrameTime)
member.summary: Compare the instance count between two FrameTimes. Used for sorting in descending order
member.returns: -1 if a is larger, 0 if the same, 1 if a is smaller

member.name: T:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.ThreadIdentifier
member.summary: Individual Thread details

member.name: P:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.ThreadIdentifier.threadNameWithIndex
member.summary: Thread name with index combined. A profiler analyzer specific unique thread representation

member.name: P:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.ThreadIdentifier.name
member.summary: Thread name (may not be unique)

member.name: P:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.ThreadIdentifier.index
member.summary: Thread index. A 1 based id for threads with matching names. -1 indicates all threads with the same name, 0 if there is only one thread with this name

member.name: F:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.ThreadIdentifier.kAll
member.summary: Thread index id which means all threads of the same name

member.name: F:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.ThreadIdentifier.kSingle
member.summary: Thread index id use when there is only one thread with this name

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.ThreadIdentifier.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initialise ThreadIdentifier

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.ThreadIdentifier.#ctor(UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.ThreadIdentifier)
member.summary: Initialise ThreadIdentifier from another ThreadIdentifier

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.ThreadIdentifier.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initialise ThreadIdentifier from a unique name
member.param: The unique name string (name with index)

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.ThreadIdentifier.SetName(System.String)
member.summary: Set the name of the thread

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.ThreadIdentifier.SetIndex(System.Int32)
member.summary: Set the index of the thread name
member.param: The index of the thread with the same name

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.ThreadIdentifier.SetAll
member.summary: Sets the index to indicate we want all threads (used for filtering against other ThreadIdentifiers)

member.name: T:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.ProfileAnalyzerWindow
member.summary: Main profile Analyzer UI window

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.ProfileAnalyzerWindow.OpenProfileAnalyzer
member.summary: Open profile analyzer window

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.ProfileAnalyzerWindow.SelectMarker(System.String)
member.summary: Select marker to focus on

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.ProfileAnalyzerWindow.GetSelectedMarkerName
member.summary: Get currently selected marker
member.returns: Name of currently selected marker, or null if none selected

member.name: M:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.ProfileAnalyzerWindow.RemapFrameIndex(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Used to remap frame indices when the loaded range in the profiler does not match the range present in the Profile Analyzer capture. This happens when we reload data into the Profiler Window as the index range becomes 1 -> n+1

member.name: T:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.Units
member.summary: Unit type identifier

member.name: F:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.Units.Milliseconds
member.summary: Time in milliseconds

member.name: F:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.Units.Microseconds
member.summary: Time in microseconds

member.name: F:UnityEditor.Performance.ProfileAnalyzer.Units.Count
member.summary: Count of number of instances
